transcript.text:
Hello, this is CNN's "Chicken Network news" and this is commentator Caster Oh Jin Suk.
And over here we have National Chickengraphic's Caster Han Joon Hee
Nice to meet you guys
Today, we are at the baseball stadium which has a capacity of 18 people
*But we are with our 2 million subscribers!
Mukbang Champion Tzuyang will be playing a total of 5 games
We will have a brief introduction of our player, Tzuyang
Tzuyang's real name is Park Jung Won Her Birthday is 4/25/1997 (Today)
She is 24 years old, 161cm tall, 49kg in weight, and has a blood type O
Player Tzuyang is entering the stadium as we speak!
Player Tzuyang!
She doesn't seem too happy
Is she in a bad mood?
It must be the wind! and it's a very hot day today
What is that!?
That's not a good sign

I already have a bad feeling about this event
Player Tzuyang is confused. She turned red!
Player Tzuyang does seem nervous!
*Laughing out of nowhere?
Player ChickenPlus is getting ready
*Entering the stadium
*Entrance Dance
*Her opponent has safely entered the ring
*Running away
I will be introducing you guys the line-up for today's Chicken Plus Game
#1 we have Theater Chicken, #2 Hot Cho King, #3 Chrispy Fried Chicken, #4 Seasoned Chicken, #5 Snow Chicken
That's Hororok Spicy Rice Cake!
I'm very thrilled to be seeing this player here today!
The lineup is STACKED!
Just imagine how delicious it would be if you dip that chicken into the spicy rice cake sauce!
I am looking forward to this game!

*Clean Cut
her skills are on another level
Does that mean she will be fueling soon!?
*Tzuyang Gas Station is OPEN
That's a relief! Very refreshing!
Bon Appetit!
I want to try this. It looks like a Glutinous Rice Donut
It looks scrumptious
That humongous dinosaur egg is going into that small mouth of hers without any struggle!
That dinosaur egg looks very chewy!
That tastes really good. I can taste the sweet potato on in the inside
What is this? Cheese Ball?
*Eating all the sides!
That goes in with 1 bite!
The deep-fried cheese ball you just saw there is filled with emmental cheese and is known to be very delicious
Isn't that high end?

That is so delicious!
I have to start off with the leg!
The Fried Leg
Is that the Crispy Fried!?
They gave me a separate container of the Spicy Rice Cake sauce
"There is no real answer is Mukbang" -Professional Mukbanger Tzuyang
She slides the bones off!
She just handles it very well
That is an amazing move by Player Tzuyang!
That is so clean!
Her contact ability is outstanding
The Spicy Rice Cake sauce tastes good!
*Finished the leg in 2 bites!
Boneless this time!
*Boneless Hot Cho King Player
Player Tzuyang's condition today seems superb

She needs to control her pace and maintain the momentum all the way to 9th inning
She needs to look at the long run
*Not even worried
Yummy
*THEN ALL OF A SUDDEN
*The bee is running on the field!
*Emergency!
There you go! Thank you!
The Casters were fast enough to avoid any accidents!
That bee came out of nowhere!
I protected her
Thank you
Can I get a photo with you after?
*He seems more interested in the photo than the game
I want 2 autographs!
*Eating the Theater Chicken They said to dip this one here

Dip dip
*3 outs for the chicken skewer
The sauce tastes like cheese
It has a kick to it. Tasty!
No words are needed for that
That is very clean
Should we eat some chicken later?
Chicken and beer?
*Already happy thinking about chicken and beer
*1 shot 4 kills for the Spicy Rice Cake
*Theater Chicken's special attack: Nachos
Why is there nachos with the chicken!?
*Chicken X Nacho Collaboration
I thought she was not controlling her pace but she is actually doing really well and it's mid-game
She is pitching against Snow Chicken as we speak!
He is gone already!

I love that feeling
The end of the tongue is on point
That's a very clean cut
Seasoned chicken's leg is gone with that huge bite!
The seasoned spicy chicken is their specialty
But she is going at it!
Player Tzuyang has sauce all over her uniform! Look how focused she is!
It reminds me of that blue crab mukbang!
The sauce was everywhere!
Think about how sad her fans will be!
She doesn't have an apron on so she needs to be careful
Safety First!
Okay!
Let's twist the joint~
*And dive right in
*1 bite 1 out?

*Is Tzuyang Player in danger?
It has been caught!
Amazing defense
There are only bones left!
*Satisfied with the round
It's the end of 5th inning and there are only 80 pitchers left
She is taking care of all of them
She went for 2 in a row!
It's kind of spicy!
She is in danger once again!
*Overcoming the spiciness with the Snow Chicken
It has been inhaled!
To rank them from my personal taste
The Snow Chicken and the Theater Chicken are my Top 2 picks
It's getting chilly now, right?
I got a jacket because of the wind

We got our outerwear due to the weather
We apologize
I thought it won't be cold anymore but I guess not
*Some difficulty due to the cold weather
Seems like she is slowing down as well
Where is Player Tzuyang going!?
She is creating heat in her body!
She is a professional
She is running so she can eat!
That is awesome
Professional Mukbanger
Not a lot of mukbang players can do that
Player Tzuyang has returned back to the pitcher's mound
Is that ours!?
Why does he only have the headgear on?
Can I get an autograph? Yes

What are you doing!?
Kick him out!
*Focusing on the mukbang again
She seems like she's eating something
*Mukbang is a fight between my inner-self
*The wind is distracting her It's so cold!
She is amazing for being able to make it this far
Her signature move!
She twists the cap with her teeth!
Fueling once again!
She is getting ready before she eats again
She is preparing for the last finale
She is going to end it once and for all
*This is the real entertainment of mukbang
That is absolutely breathtaking!
It is a battle between time right now

It's very important!
History is about to be made! In the Korean history and the Mukbang history!
This is the moment and we are here together with her!
*The end is near
*Hot Cho King has been defeated
She seems very relaxed!
Only 1 more player left for the Crispy Chicken
She is being very careful
And it has been defeated!
Another history being made!
Tzuyang legend lives on!
The last bits of the seasoned spicy chicken!
It's going into Player Tzuyang's mouth! MOUTH!
1 last piece!
*Not too easy
She seems to be struggling with this one

Player Tzuyang will overcome!
Going towards that last bite!
She is going for it!
2 more left
*And with everyone's support
*Defeated
Look at all those empty boxes!
All 4 boxes have been eliminated
There is only 1 piece left in the last box
The audience are on their feet
I have 1 more left
A new history being made for the year 2020 Mukbang records
*A clean homerun for all 5 chickens
She still needs to finish her fuel!
We will be closing the game with the victory of Tzuyang
This is Caster Han Joon Hee and Caster Oh Jin Suk

Thank you
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
